title: Accessory Bundle
description: Redeem for a curated accessory bundle that upgrades the device experience. Perfect for increasing attach-rate and customer satisfaction.

title: Free Screen Protector
description: A practical reward customers actually want, with clear everyday value. Use it to drive in-store visits and add-on sales.

title: VIP Setup Session
description: A guided setup session that builds trust and reduces returns. Ideal for new customers and premium device purchases.

title: Warranty Discount
description: Discount token for extended coverage that protects margin and boosts confidence. A smart reward that supports upsell.

title: Headphones Discount
description: Discount on premium headphones that feels aspirational without being a blanket sale. Great for launch calendars and seasonal gifting.

title: Member Gift Card
description: A small tech store credit that feels flexible and motivating. Perfect as a milestone reward for high-engagement members.
